title: Potato PVP pack
description: It changes the appearance of Minecraft, lowers lag, the package also has a plastic look and some items have been changed.
body:
Potato PVP Pack - Extreme FPS Boost
Potato PVP Pack is a minimalist resource pack designed for players who need maximum performance and clarity during combat. This pack replaces standard Minecraft textures with simplified, smooth versions, significantly helping to increase frames per second (FPS) on low-end PCs and laptops.
Key Features:
Minimalist Blocks: Grass and dirt features a simplified "flat" design, allowing you to focus better on your opponents and surroundings.
FPS Boost: By reducing texture complexity, the game runs much smoother, which is crucial for modes like BedWars, SkyWars, or Crystal PVP.
Visual Clarity: Removing unnecessary details from terrain blocks makes player models and mobs stand out more clearly against the environment.
Optimization: A lightweight solution for anyone looking to eliminate stuttering and lag during intense gameplay.
The perfect choice for competitive players who prioritize smooth gameplay over complex visuals
